title: Large Black Chopping Board - 36 x 26cm Granite Effect. Hygienic, Knife Friendly When Cutting Or Preparing in The Kitchen. Scratch Resistant, Double-Sided Use, Ridged & Tough. Dishwasher Safe.
features: ✅ LARGE MEAL PREP - The 36 x 26cm cutting surface provides enough space to cut several ingredients at once without having them fall off the board. Ideal for slicing and dicing all of the vegetables for a stir-fry. Perfect when making different meals at once for all your families unique tastes. You can also use both surfaces as it is double-sided.

✅ HYGIENIC - The high density polypropylene material makes for easy wiping and cleaning, particularly after the preparation of raw meat. It is also highly resistant to odours and staining from liquid and juices due to the non-porous property of the plastic. The board is also dishwasher safe, with the intense cleaning and high temperature washing killing any traces of bacteria.

✅ KNIFE FRIENDLY - The polypropylene material is durable, yet soft enough not to damage and blunt knife blades when cutting. Keeps a keen edge on your kitchen knives. Knife makers, ourselves included, always recommend plastic or wooden chopping boards because glass, slate or metal can chip and blunten your expensive kitchen knives.

✅ LIGHTWEIGHT AND EASILY STORED - Small: 65mm thick, Medium & Large: 80mm thick. Thinner and lighter, but just as strong as a typical wooden chopping board, but easier to store out of the way after use. Including a light weight and recessed handle making them ideal for serving at a barbecue or picnic. Ideal to take on a camping trip or for use in your caravan.

✅ RANGE OF COLOURS AND SIZES - The Taylor's Eye Witness chopping boards are available in a range of colours and sizes, allowing you to choose a set of boards to compliment your kitchen colour scheme. Use different sizes for different uses. Small for sandwiches, medium for preparing a small meal and large for when you are cooking a bigger meal and are preparing lots of vegetables.
description: Kitchen cutting board in black marble look from Taylor's Eye Witness. The 36 x 28 cm polypropylene board is particularly knife-friendly and of course suitable for cleaning in the dishwasher. Keep away from hot surfaces and open flames.
